mdf.name: MDF
mdf.description: Plain MDF (medium-density fiberboard) — a uniform warm beige-tan surface with no wood grain, no texture variation, no streaks. Smooth, consistent, matte appearance throughout.

alabaster-taction-oak.name: Alabaster Taction RTF
alabaster-taction-oak.description: This is an RTF vinyl wrap — NOT real wood. Despite the name, the grain pattern runs VERTICALLY (top to bottom) across the entire surface including all rails. Do NOT apply natural wood grain direction rules.
